### S5-001: Natural Language Form Field Modification (12 test cases)
**Type**: Playwright UI Tests

- `/docs/tests/S5-001/TC-S5-001-01.py` - Add email field with validation pattern

- `/docs/tests/S5-001/TC-S5-001-04.py` - Add name field with alphanumeric validation
